task_completion.description: The NoteKeeper project directory is accessed in the terminal or opened in an IDE.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The terminal shows navigation to '~/AndroidStudioProjects/NoteKeeper' or Android Studio is open with the NoteKeeper project loaded.

task_completion.description: The Spanish strings.xml file is created in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path 'app/src/main/res/values-es/strings.xml' is visible in the editor tab, file explorer, or terminal command.

task_completion.description: The Spanish translations are correctly added to the resource file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the Spanish strings.xml file or Translations Editor show correct Spanish text, such as 'Inicio' for home, 'Guardar' for save, and 'Nota eliminada' for note deleted.

task_completion.description: The French strings.xml file is created in the correct directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The file path 'app/src/main/res/values-fr/strings.xml' is visible in the editor tab, file explorer, or terminal command.

task_completion.description: The French translations are correctly added to the resource file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The contents of the French strings.xml file or Translations Editor show correct French text, such as 'Accueil' for home, 'Enregistrer' for save, and 'Note supprimée' for note deleted.

task_completion.description: The string keys used in the localized files match the English base keys exactly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The XML <string name="..."> attributes use the exact keys specified (e.g., 'title_home', 'action_save', 'msg_note_deleted') rather than different names.

integrity.description: The files are modified within the NoteKeeper project directory.
integrity.visual_evidence: The terminal or editor shows the working directory is ~/AndroidStudioProjects/NoteKeeper.

integrity.description: The translations are formatted as valid Android XML string resources.
integrity.visual_evidence: The files contain <resources> and <string name="...">...</string> tags, or are entered via Android Studio's Translations Editor.

integrity.description: The agent did not accidentally paste markdown formatting or instructions into the XML files.
integrity.visual_evidence: The XML files contain only valid XML tags and the translated strings, without markdown backticks or bullet points from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The NoteKeeper project is at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/NoteKeeper. 15 string keys must be localized. Verified Spanish spot-checks: title_home='Inicio', action_save='Guardar', msg_note_deleted='Nota eliminada'. Verified French spot-checks: title_home='Accueil', action_save='Enregistrer', msg_note_deleted='Note supprimée'.
